prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, listen up! That task you've been circling all morning? It's not getting any smaller, and you're not getting any less capable. You've got this. Seriously.

Take a deep breath. You're smart, you're resourceful, and you've tackled tough things before. This is just another one. Break it down, take that first step, and remember how good it's going to feel when it's done. You've got the power to conquer this. Go get it!
